title: Approver avatar stack
notes: Compact avatar-stack showing a requirement's resolved_approvers with decision badges. Approved = green checkmark, Rejected = red X, Pending = no badge. Max 5 avatars shown; overflow renders '+N more'.

itemTemplate.propsExpr: { src: item.avatar_url, name: item.display_name, size: 'sm', decorator: decisionFor(item.id, props.decisions) }

helpers.decisionFor: (userId, decisions) => { const d = decisions.find(x => x.approver_id === userId); return d ? (d.decision === 'approve' ? { icon: 'check', variant: 'success' } : { icon: 'x-mark', variant: 'danger' }) : null; }
